name: Spaghetti Squash with Shallot Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Pierce the spaghetti squash several times with a fork and place it on a rimmed baking sheet.
3. Bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the squash gives when pressed. After 30 minutes, turn the squash over.
4. Cut the squash in half and scrape out and discard the seeds.
5. Loosen the squash strands and scoop them into a warm serving bowl.
6. In a small nonstick skillet, sauté the shallots in butter over low heat for about 4 minutes until wilted.
7. Pour the sautéed shallot mixture over the spaghetti strands and toss lightly.
Food Exchange per Serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE; CAL: 36; PRO: 1g; CAR: 6g; CHO: 3mg; SOD: 156mg.
Source: Joslin Diabetes Gourmet Cookbook by Bonnie Sanders Polin & Frances Towner Giedt.
